title: psychotria tahanensis
intro: Psychotria tahanensis is a species of plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the Tahan psychotria or simply psychotria. This plant is used in traditional medicine in Southeast Asia, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Psychotria tahanensis include its ability to treat various conditions such as fever, cough, and skin infections, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant are typically harvested, dried, and processed into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
